reviews.review_description: Good demo of the game.  I will put the full game on my list of games to try.

I enjoyed watching this in development. The dev is very receptive to suggestions and is clearly working hard to improve it. This is a very short intro but proves he's got a vision. Nothing that will stump you but the puzzle graphics are nicely detailed (environment less so, but we're only here for the puzzles :) ) Controls are still pretty finicky but nothing game-breaking. Excited to see where this goes!

developer_response.body: Thank you for your kind review! We are working hard to improve the controls and to create better, more interesting puzzles!

reviews.review_description: As a demo is ok, the puzzles are not difficult at all but shows the mechanism that can be done gameplay wise. Hope the full game will give more challenges.

developer_response.body:
Thank you for your review! we are working on the full release these days and working on the difficulty arc so players will not get overwhelmed.
You can join our discord to get real-time updates.

reviews.review_description:
I really liked how this game manages to superise you. 

It is challenging but not frustrating. Perfect combination!

I thought it was very interesting.  I only struggled with trying to hold onto the puzzle pieces to prevent them from floating away.  Especially not knowing if I could get them back.  Would have been nice if you could set them on the table.

All in all though, fun and interesting puzzles.

developer_response.body:
Thank you for your kind review :)
You can even throw them away and they will return to you. you are blood bound :P
also, you can lock them in place, did you notice the instruction on the stone tablet?

reviews.review_description: I thought the puzzles were fairly simple but fun.  On one puzzle there was a glitch that didn’t allow me to manipulate both wheels after switching from one to the other.  Left the game and returned and it happened again.  After leaving once more it finally worked.  That’s the reason I left a star off.

developer_response.body:
Hi! Thank you for your feedback, I'm sorry you had this bug, we are working hard on smoothing out all the edges, Is the puzzle you are referring to the puzzle on the tablet with the rune matching? 
You could also join our Discord for a bug report and more content on the upcoming full release.

https://discord.com/invite/nfkHScbe7d

reviews.review_description:
Very nice experience, works well in passthrough, can talk to the family while solving the puzzles which is nice.
puzzles are challenging but not too hard.

developer_response.body:
Thank you for your kind review :)
that's what we hoped passthrough would give the players!

reviews.review_description: Great game! I enjoyed it very much and I highly recommend to play the game.
nice pacing, pretty short, would have liked some more puzzles.

developer_response.body: We are planning to launch in about mid-2025 with much more puzzle verity :)

reviews.review_description: I really enjoyed the testing. Nice puzzles just need to improve control handling for the final game :)

developer_response.body:
Thank you for your kind response!
We are working hard on bettering the controls, an update will be live soon!

reviews.review_title: Can't wait to play a full version
reviews.review_description:
I had fun with this, obviously it's pretty short as it's an introduction to hopefully a full version of the game, but what's here is a good starting point for sure.
It offers a good variety of puzzle boxes and nothing too complex, I didn't feel stuck at any point.
There's a couple things that I would change, being able to lock a puzzle in place to work on them and having things float but without drifting off, you can easily grip which auto drags them to your hand,but I would prefer just placing them somewhere and them not float up to the ceiling.
It also has a VR mode,which is a desert or a MR mode so you can keep an eye on your surroundings.

developer_response.body:
Thank you for the kind review!
we will be working on quality-of-life issues like the floating items on final stages of polish.
